_comment: State file for the daily-doc-refresh workflow. The workflow reads this, compares against freshly-fetched values, and opens an issue (always) plus an optional PR if a clean version bump is detected. Edit by hand to mark a value as 'known but skip auto-PR' or to seed initial values.

internal_tools._comment: Last-seen list of repo names in GlobalShopSolutions-InternalTools, sorted. The workflow diffs this list against current to detect new/removed apps.

Zen Log Parser transforms complex log data into an easy-to-navigate tabbed interface, allowing database administrators and developers to efficiently analyze SQL query performance and identify optimization opportunities.

Data sourced from IHOP_Net si_action and Issue_Maintenance.
